config.title: Performance Settings
config.enabled.name: Enable Throttling
config.enabled.tooltip: If enabled, NPCs not in your current location will update less frequently to save FPS.
config.interval.name: Update Interval
config.interval.tooltip:
How often background NPCs update.
2 = Every other frame (50% load).
10 = Very choppy background movement (Low load).
config.force-villagers.name: Always Update Villagers
config.force-villagers.tooltip: If true, named villagers (like Caroline) are never throttled, only monsters/horses/junimos are.
config.debug.name: Enable Debug Logging
config.debug.tooltip: Shows performance stats in SMAPI console every second. Use this to verify the mod is working and see how much CPU load you're saving!
